label: The Library — faster end to end
items: Tabs pre-warm in the background — the moment you open a plant, Grow Guide and Companions both start loading even before you tap the tab. By the time you switch, the data is usually already there.
Search now uses the saved snapshot when you re-submit the same query — no more re-firing every provider for a query you just ran.
Companion lookups now share a single network call across the preview-screen pre-warm AND the Companions tab itself (was firing twice and burning AI quota).

label: Bug fixes
items: Light tab — sunlight requirements now show for AI plants. Was reading the empty flat column instead of the rich care_guide_data blob.
